description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden body with two distinct seating or cargo compartments, separated by a central divider. The sides and back are constructed from dark, weathered wood panels, while the interior surfaces and dividers are finished in a glossy black material. The cart is supported by four large, spoked metal wheels, with the front wheels attached to a simple black metal axle and frame. The front of the cart has an extended metal handlebar for pushing or pulling, and the open design allows for easy loading and unloading of goods or passengers. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for transporting items or people in an urban environment.
description: A wooden handcart with two open compartments, glossy black interiors, and four large spoked metal wheels. It features a front handlebar and a sturdy, open design for easy loading.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open compartments, central divider, and the extended metal handlebar with two front wheels visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the spoked wheels, open compartments, and the depth of the cart's body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wooden panel, rear wheels, and the overall width of the cart.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the open compartments and wheel structure from the other side.
